markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard new team members with GrowthX's strategy, vision, and current progress in building an AI-enabled marketing platform.](https://fathom.video/share/uBAabpXQKELM8aYGqxUsqA_jRQMxW7vF?tab=summary&timestamp=213.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX is evolving from a service-based model to a tech-enabled platform (Atlas/ContentOS) that combines AI and human expertise for marketing outcomes](https://fathom.video/share/uBAabpXQKELM8aYGqxUsqA_jRQMxW7vF?tab=summary&timestamp=1577.0)
  - [The company is at $13M+ run rate with 70% gross margins, serving 60 customers at an average of $216K/year](https://fathom.video/share/uBAabpXQKELM8aYGqxUsqA_jRQMxW7vF?tab=summary&timestamp=377.0)
  - [GrowthX recently secured a $2M investment from HubSpot and is launching new products like CheckThat.ai for AI visibility tracking](https://fathom.video/share/uBAabpXQKELM8aYGqxUsqA_jRQMxW7vF?tab=summary&timestamp=1958.0)
  - [The long-term vision is to build a "system of work" for marketing that codifies workflows, measures interventions, and continuously improves through context engineering](https://fathom.video/share/uBAabpXQKELM8aYGqxUsqA_jRQMxW7vF?tab=summary&timestamp=1750.0)

## Topics

### Company Overview and Market Opportunity

  - [GrowthX is targeting a massive market: 32,000 content agencies in the US, 300,000+ freelancers in content/SEO services](https://fathom.video/share/uBAabpXQKELM8aYGqxUsqA_jRQMxW7vF?tab=summary&timestamp=824.0)
  - [Potential $3.2-4B annual run rate if reaching similar market penetration as SEMrush (25,000 customers)](https://fathom.video/share/uBAabpXQKELM8aYGqxUsqA_jRQMxW7vF?tab=summary&timestamp=856.0)
  - [Addressing pain points: rising customer acquisition costs, demand for AI visibility, talent shortages, and complex marketing tools](https://fathom.video/share/uBAabpXQKELM8aYGqxUsqA_jRQMxW7vF?tab=summary&timestamp=620.0)

### Platform Development: Atlas/ContentOS

  - [Internal "system of work" platform combining AI workflows and human expertise](https://fathom.video/share/uBAabpXQKELM8aYGqxUsqA_jRQMxW7vF?tab=summary&timestamp=1036.0)
  - [Features include:](https://fathom.video/share/uBAabpXQKELM8aYGqxUsqA_jRQMxW7vF?tab=summary&timestamp=1132.0)
      - [Activity tracking to correlate actions with outcomes](https://fathom.video/share/uBAabpXQKELM8aYGqxUsqA_jRQMxW7vF?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
      - [Context management for client knowledge](https://fathom.video/share/uBAabpXQKELM8aYGqxUsqA_jRQMxW7vF?tab=summary&timestamp=1220.0)
      - [Deep researcher using AI (AXA, Proplaxity) to build a knowledge graph](https://fathom.video/share/uBAabpXQKELM8aYGqxUsqA_jRQMxW7vF?tab=summary&timestamp=1254.0)
      - [Agentic workflows as code for scalable execution](https://fathom.video/share/uBAabpXQKELM8aYGqxUsqA_jRQMxW7vF?tab=summary&timestamp=1285.0)
      - [Fact-checking and content improvement capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/uBAabpXQKELM8aYGqxUsqA_jRQMxW7vF?tab=summary&timestamp=1354.0)
      - [Automated image and infographic generation](https://fathom.video/share/uBAabpXQKELM8aYGqxUsqA_jRQMxW7vF?tab=summary&timestamp=1392.0)

### Strategic Direction

  - [Shifting from 100% service-based revenue to a mix of high-end services and platform offerings](https://fathom.video/share/uBAabpXQKELM8aYGqxUsqA_jRQMxW7vF?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Expanding from content/organic growth focus to potentially cover more marketing jobs-to-be-done](https://fathom.video/share/uBAabpXQKELM8aYGqxUsqA_jRQMxW7vF?tab=summary&timestamp=1426.0)
  - [Gradually moving from internal use to customer-operated platform](https://fathom.video/share/uBAabpXQKELM8aYGqxUsqA_jRQMxW7vF?tab=summary&timestamp=1463.0)
  - [Launching standalone products like CheckThat.ai for AI visibility tracking](https://fathom.video/share/uBAabpXQKELM8aYGqxUsqA_jRQMxW7vF?tab=summary&timestamp=1509.0)

### Team and Roles

  - [Company structure: build team and deliver team working closely together](https://fathom.video/share/uBAabpXQKELM8aYGqxUsqA_jRQMxW7vF?tab=summary&timestamp=327.0)
  - [Forward-deployed strategists (experts) will remain important, but roles may evolve as the platform develops](https://fathom.video/share/uBAabpXQKELM8aYGqxUsqA_jRQMxW7vF?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Focus on being selective with service clients to drive platform innovation](https://fathom.video/share/uBAabpXQKELM8aYGqxUsqA_jRQMxW7vF?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)

### Funding and Growth

  - [Recently closed $2M investment from HubSpot](https://fathom.video/share/uBAabpXQKELM8aYGqxUsqA_jRQMxW7vF?tab=summary&timestamp=1958.0)
  - [Running capital-efficiently while proving AI+human expert model](https://fathom.video/share/uBAabpXQKELM8aYGqxUsqA_jRQMxW7vF?tab=summary&timestamp=444.0)
  - [Building in public: sharing progress and some financials for transparency](https://fathom.video/share/uBAabpXQKELM8aYGqxUsqA_jRQMxW7vF?tab=summary&timestamp=383.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Launch parts of Atlas as a customer-facing dashboard within the next month](https://fathom.video/share/uBAabpXQKELM8aYGqxUsqA_jRQMxW7vF?tab=summary&timestamp=1463.0)
  - [Release CheckThat.ai as a standalone AI visibility tool](https://fathom.video/share/uBAabpXQKELM8aYGqxUsqA_jRQMxW7vF?tab=summary&timestamp=1509.0)
  - [Continue developing and dogfooding internal tools and blogs](https://fathom.video/share/uBAabpXQKELM8aYGqxUsqA_jRQMxW7vF?tab=summary&timestamp=1408.0)
  - [Pursue upsell opportunity with Webflow for templates library project](https://fathom.video/share/uBAabpXQKELM8aYGqxUsqA_jRQMxW7vF?tab=summary&timestamp=1958.0)
